requirement: the format specifies its core and how it extends and evolves

ratingResult.rationale: The minimal core, extension boundaries, unrecognized-content preservation, and external versioning policy are defined sufficiently for compatible evolution.

findings.observation: The root model requires ratingScale plus at least one of factors, requirements, or targets.
Extensions cannot change conforming-property meaning, and tools should preserve unrecognized extension fields and body content.
The specification identifies its version and points to the project versioning policy for forward-versioning behavior.
